title: Credit Allocation Tightening Signal
economic_mechanism: Bank lending constraints reduce investment and working capital.
headline: Unauthorised app transfers drain salary from Rupali Bank account; customer left helpless
expected_effects: investment slowdown; working capital shortages; lower GDP growth
who_should_care: commercial banks; corporate borrowers; investment desks

title: Remittance Flow Disruption
economic_mechanism: Remittance slowdown reduces rural household income, weakens consumption demand, and tightens FX supply.
headline: Expatriates' minister fears remittance drop due to Middle East war
expected_effects: rural consumption slowdown; FX supply reduction; hundi channel widening
who_should_care: rural economy analysts; consumer sector; central bank

title: Fiscal Revenue Stress
economic_mechanism: Tax revenue shortfalls force expenditure compression or borrowing, crowding out development spending and raising domestic debt costs.
headline: Mounting fiscal challenges loom as NBR falls short of revenue target: GED
expected_effects: development spending cut; domestic borrowing increase; treasury yield pressure
who_should_care: bond market; development agencies; government contractors

title: Banking Sector Fragility
economic_mechanism: Rising non-performing loans, governance failures, or liquidity stress in banks constrain credit intermediation and erode depositor confidence.
headline: Bangladesh Bank allows renewal of continuous loans before default, with 3-month window
expected_effects: credit rationing; deposit flight risk; fiscal contingent liability

title: Food Price Pressure
economic_mechanism: Rising staple prices compress real incomes of the poor, raise wage demands, and feed into broader inflation expectations.
headline: Gold prices hiked by Tk3,324 per bhori
expected_effects: real income erosion for the poor; wage pressure; headline inflation rise
who_should_care: consumer sector; food importers; social protection agencies
